description: well_known maps 22/80/443/53 to their programs and everything else to 'unknown'; route_to_app returns the app behind the matching door or 'closed'; is_open returns a bool.
An unknown port returns 'unknown'; a port not in the map returns 'closed' and is_open returns False; the matching door returns its exact app name.
is_open reuses route_to_app instead of scanning the map again; clear names; a return on every path.
